**TEMPO frontier-orbital energies** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 2. Geometry: user-supplied from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz`. SCF converged after 12 cycles.

LUMO energy: -2.4651235 eV

`/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --mult 2 --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp1e9q4mrw/live.json`
